description_long: This is a classic, ornate bed frame finished in a soft white color, featuring both a high headboard and a matching footboard with decorative carved details. The frame is constructed from wood and includes turned posts at each corner, adding to its traditional aesthetic. The side rails and footboard are equipped with multiple drawers, each with metal handles, providing integrated storage space beneath the slatted base. The slatted support system is visible, designed to hold a mattress securely. The overall design is elegant and functional, suitable for a bedroom with a vintage or cottage-inspired decor. The bed's robust construction and storage features make it practical for urban living spaces where maximizing utility is important.
description: A white, ornate wooden bed frame with carved headboard and footboard, featuring under-bed storage drawers and a slatted base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative headboard and footboard with carved details and turned posts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the under-bed storage drawers with metal handles and the slatted mattress support.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the footboard and the overall height of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional storage drawers and the full length of the slatted base.
